title: Monday Roundup | January 12, 2026
description: Genocide scholars issue a warning about US actions against transgender people, and the scope of the trans refugee crisis is revealed, while the DOJ takes aim at professionals providing legal care.
author: well . beings . NEWS

title: The Monday Roundup | May 26, 2025
description: A broad, two-year study commissioned by Utah Republicans confirms that their gender-affirming care ban is harming transgender youth. Unsurprisingly, lawmakers are simply ignoring the results.
author: well . beings . NEWS
